questionHtml:
In which of the following compounds does ionic bonding predominate?

A.  HCl

B.  NaF

C.  NH4Br

D.  NaOH

meta.title: In which of the following compounds does ionic bonding predominate? A. HCl B. NaF C. NH4Br D. NaOH
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure

Structure 2.4.1—Bonding is best described as a continuum between the ionic, covalent and metallic models, and can be represented by a bonding triangle. Use bonding models to explain the properties of a material.
